sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108058" key="u(ph/trion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπήτριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n108058.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the part of the body below the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἦτρον,</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">paunch,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θύννων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">51</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
